segments.text: They came to Ecbatana, and arrived at the house of Raguel. But Sarah met them; and she greeted them, and they her. Then she brought them into the house.
Raguel said to Edna his wife,
This young man really resembles Tobit my cousin!
segments.speaker: Raguel

segments.text: And Raguel asked them,
Where are you two from, kindred?
segments.speaker: Raguel

segments.text: They said to him,
We are of the sons of Naphtali, who are captives in Nineveh.
segments.speaker: Raguel

segments.text: He said to them,
Do you know Tobit our brother?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: They said,
We know him.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Then he said to them,
Is he in good health?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: They said,
He is both alive, and in good health.
segments.speaker: Tobias

segments.text: Tobias said,
He is my father.
segments.speaker: Tobias

segments.text: And Raguel sprang up, and kissed him, wept,
blessed him, and said to him,
You are the son of an honest and good man.
segments.speaker: blessed him, and

segments.text: When he had heard that Tobit had lost his sight, he was grieved, and wept;
and Edna his wife and Sarah his daughter wept. They received them gladly; and they killed a ram of the flock, and served them meat. But Tobias said to Raphael,
Brother Azarias, speak of those things of which you talked about in the way, and let the matter be finished.
segments.speaker: blessed him, and

segments.text: So he communicated the thing to Raguel. Raguel said to Tobias,
Eat, drink, and make merry:
segments.speaker: Raguel

segments.text: for it belongs to you to take my child. However I will tell you the truth.
segments.speaker: Raguel

segments.text: I have given my child to seven men of our relatives, and whenever they came in to her, they died in the night. But for the present be merry.
segments.speaker: Tobias

segments.text: And Tobias said,
I will taste nothing here, until you all make a covenant and enter into that covenant with me.
segments.speaker: Tobias

segments.text: Raguel said,
Take her to yourself from now on according to custom. You are her relative, and she is yours. The merciful God will give all good success to you.
segments.speaker: Raguel

segments.text: And he called his daughter Sarah, and took her by the hand, and gave her to be wife of Tobias, and said,
Behold, take her to yourself after the law of Moses, and lead her away to your father.
segments.speaker: Raguel

segments.text: And he blessed them.
He called Edna his wife, then took a book, wrote a contract, and sealed it.
Then they began to eat.
And Raguel called his wife Edna, and said to her,
Sister, prepare the other chamber, and bring her in there.
segments.speaker: Raguel

segments.text: She did as he asked her, and brought her in there. She wept, and she received the tears of her daughter, and said to her,
Be comforted, my child. May the Lord of heaven and earth give you favor[^13] for this your sorrow. Be comforted, my daughter.
segments.speaker: Raguel
